title: Grabowski soll Bureau-Lease-Vertrag für Always-on-Operationen konsumieren
goal: Grabowski consumes Bureau's machine-readable lease contract so covered operational state reads and appends remain available under repo:bureau leases while Git-backed mutations remain fail-closed.

acceptance.assertion: Grabowski evaluates the deployed Bureau lease-contract for covered Bureau operations and fails closed for unknown operations or unavailable/invalid contract output.
With an active repo:/home/alex/repos/bureau lease, live-register, live-list, live-export and live-retention remain usable without acquiring or overriding that repository lease.
Declared read-only projections are not rejected solely because repo:bureau is leased; required Registry/state inputs may still fail closed independently.
Bureau code, schema, reviewed Git Registry, branch, merge and deployment mutations remain blocked by a foreign repo:bureau lease.
Focused tests cover allowed operational commands, denied Git-backed commands, missing contract output and unknown operation classes.
The merged Grabowski runtime is deployed and a live lease-bound smoke proves both the allowed and denied paths.

metadata.registration_boundary: This task does not alter the active foreign Grabowski ball, grant merge/deploy authority, or weaken non-Bureau repository leases.
